action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves current real-time data from the greenhouse sensors including soil moisture and tank levels.

action_set_definitions.name: get_water_quality_data
action_set_definitions.description: Analyzes the raw leachate and current system water for UV Transmittance (UVT) and ion concentrations.

action_set_definitions.name: configure_filtration_path
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the path for the reclamation unit. Use 'media_filtration' for low clarity/UVT water and 'direct_path' for clear water.

action_set_definitions.name: process_leachate_reclamation
action_set_definitions.description: Initiates the reclamation of raw leachate into the system buffer.

volume_to_reclaim_liters.description: The amount of water to process from leachate.

action_set_definitions.name: apply_uvc_disinfection
action_set_definitions.description: Applies UV-C radiation to the reclaimed water to neutralize pathogens like ToBRFV.

dose_mj_cm2.description: The UV-C dose intensity in mJ/cm².

action_set_definitions.name: execute_ion_rebalancing
action_set_definitions.description: Performs a system bleed and Reverse Osmosis (RO) dilution to lower non-target ion concentrations.

action_set_definitions.name: finalize_irrigation_and_refill
action_set_definitions.description: Triggers the final irrigation pump and completes the tank refill to target levels.

state_description.soil_moisture_percentage: The current volumetric water content in the soil, ranging from 0 to 100.
state_description.ambient_temperature_celsius: The internal air temperature of the greenhouse in degrees Celsius.
state_description.water_tank_level_liters: The volume of water remaining in the irrigation supply tank.
state_description.pump_active: Indicates whether the irrigation pump is currently powered on.
state_description.humidity_percentage: The relative humidity level inside the greenhouse.
state_description.last_irrigation_timestamp: The system time when the irrigation system was last deactivated.
